sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: DuPont Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
feed.summary: DuPont (NYSE: DD) announced it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results on Tuesday, May 5, 2026, at 6:00 a.m. ET, followed by a conference call at 8:00 a.m. ET. The conference call will be webcast live on DuPont's Investor Relations webpage, where the earnings release and supporting materials will also be posted.

feed.title: People are using this storage unit side hustle hack to score almost $700 extra a month — here’s how it works
feed.summary: Many Americans are utilizing storage units to support their side hustles, earning an average of $646 extra per month. This approach allows entrepreneurs to avoid costly investments in warehouse space and free up room at home by storing inventory or equipment. Storage units offer flexibility with month-to-month rentals and varying sizes, with some even offering amenities like Wi-Fi, electrical outlets, or office spaces, but potential users should research restrictions, costs, and insurance needs.

feed.title: How to Get as High as 275,000 Points in a Year With 2 Amex Cards
feed.summary: This article outlines how to earn up to 275,000 American Express Membership Rewards points in a year by strategically acquiring and utilizing two specific Amex cards: the American Express® Gold Card and the American Express Platinum Card®. It details the welcome bonus offers, spending categories for maximum points, and the significant benefits and annual fees associated with each card. The author emphasizes the importance of applying for the Gold Card first to maximize eligibility for both offers and advises readers to ensure they can leverage the cards' benefits to offset the high annual fees.

feed.title: AMD and the French Government Announce Plans to Advance AI Innovation, Research and Open Ecosystem Development in France
feed.summary: AMD and the French government have announced a collaboration to advance AI innovation, research, and open ecosystem development in France. The initiative, formalized through a Letter of Intent, aims to strengthen France's AI capabilities by expanding access to AMD AI compute resources, providing training for researchers and developers, and supporting the development of the Alice Recoque exascale supercomputer. This partnership seeks to bolster France's position in the global AI landscape and enhance its scientific and academic ecosystem.

feed.title: Agentic AI growth will give this cybersecurity stock a big boost, Raymond James says
feed.summary: Raymond James upgraded cybersecurity firm Okta to outperform, citing the potential for significant growth driven by agentic artificial intelligence. Analyst Adam Tindle believes that as AI moves into production for enterprise use, agentic AI tools will require their own identity security, expanding Okta's addressable market. Additionally, Okta is expected to benefit from expanding into identity governance and privileged access management, with a major headwind for its stock price now subsiding.

feed.title: Telefônica Brasil Board Approves R$365 Million Interest on Capital Distribution
feed.summary: Telefônica Brasil's board of directors has approved the distribution of R$365 million in interest on capital, equivalent to R$0.11421932485 per share. Shareholders of record by April 27, 2026, will receive this distribution, which will count towards the mandatory 2026 dividend and is scheduled for payment by April 30, 2027. This move reinforces the company's commitment to returning cash to investors, with TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rating VIV as an Outperform due to strong financial fundamentals and a focus on shareholder returns.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Adjusts PT on Everest Group to $332 From $304, Maintains Equalweight Rating

This update reflects an updated financial outlook for the reinsurance company. The article also briefly lists other analyst price target adjustments for Everest Group from various firms in April and February 2026.

feed.title: Only one medical supplier won all 3 new HIRC awards: BD
feed.summary: BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company) has been recognized by the Healthcare Industry Resilience Collaborative (HIRC) as the only supplier to receive all three inaugural Member Choice Awards for Transparency, Resiliency, and Partnership. These awards are based on real-world customer experience and acknowledge BD's efforts in sharing timely data, maintaining product continuity during disruptions, and fostering collaborative relationships. BD has also consistently received HIRC's Transparency Badge for four consecutive years and the Resiliency Badge in 2025, highlighting its ongoing commitment to supply chain excellence.
